data.name: ZZZGachaInfoWindow_ZZZGachaInfoWindowGuide
data.value: Cï¿½ng c? nï¿½y du?c dï¿½ng d? c?p nh?t hï¿½nh ?nh v?t ph?m cho l?ch s? gacha c?a ZZZ. Ch?n "Miyoushe" ho?c "HoYoLAB" ? gï¿½c phï¿½a trï¿½n cï¿½ng bï¿½n trï¿½i, dang nh?p, vï¿½ ch? d? li?u c?a b?n du?c l?y v?. N?u b?n dang nh?p vï¿½o HoYoLAB, b?n c?n ph?i ch?n "L?y v? d? li?u c?a t?t c? ngï¿½n ng?". R?t hoan nghï¿½nh b?n cung c?p cï¿½c d? li?u dï¿½ xu?t vï¿½o repo sau dï¿½y:

data.name: UIGFGachaService_UidMismatchDetectedExpected0ButFound1

data.name: HotkeySetting_SingleKeyShortcutsTips
data.value: Khi d?t phï¿½m t?t m?t phï¿½m (F1ï¿½F12), hï¿½y kh?i ch?y Glowworm du?i quy?n admin, vï¿½ n?u khï¿½ng thï¿½ phï¿½m t?t cï¿½ th? b? vï¿½ hi?u trong game.

data.name: ScreenshotSetting_ScreenshotFetureDescAndLimit
data.value: Tï¿½nh nang ch?p ?nh mï¿½n hï¿½nh ch?p trï¿½ choi dang ch?y. N?u cï¿½ nhi?u trï¿½ choi dang ch?y cï¿½ng lï¿½c, tï¿½nh nang s? x? lï¿½ c?a s? trï¿½ choi v?a du?c thao tï¿½c g?n nh?t. Luu ï¿½ cï¿½c gi?i h?n sau: ï¿½ Khï¿½ng th? ch?p c?a s? trï¿½ choi dang du?c thu nh?. ï¿½ Ph?n c?a s? trï¿½ choi ? ngoï¿½i rï¿½a mï¿½n hï¿½nh s? khï¿½ng du?c ch?p. ï¿½ Trong m?t s? tru?ng h?p hi?m g?p, tï¿½nh nang cï¿½ th? ch?p sang c?a s? khï¿½c.

data.name: ScreenshotSetting_ScreenshotWin10Limit
data.value: Trï¿½n Windows 10, tï¿½nh nang ch?p mï¿½n hï¿½nh cï¿½ thï¿½m cï¿½c gi?i h?n sau: ï¿½ M?t vi?n mï¿½u cï¿½ th? xu?t hi?n xung quanh c?a s? trï¿½ choi trong lï¿½c ch?p. ï¿½ Con tr? chu?t khï¿½ng th? b? ?n.

data.value: N?u b?n mu?n ch?p ?nh mï¿½n hï¿½nh b?ng b? di?u khi?n, vui lï¿½ng s? d?ng ch?c nang ï¿½nh x? nï¿½t trong trang C?i thi?n tay c?m.
